title: lepisorus stolzii
intro: Lepisorus stolzii, also known as the Stolzii fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus stolzii include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction for consumption, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
